title: Surrogate Keys & Tagged Invalidation
description: Implement surrogate keys for fine-grained content invalidation in CDN environments. Architect global cache purging systems using tagged invalidation to achieve instantaneous updates. Design strategies for managing cache freshness and consistency across distributed CDN nodes.
objectives: Implement surrogate keys for fine-grained content invalidation in CDN environments.
Architect global cache purging systems using tagged invalidation to achieve instantaneous updates.
Design strategies for managing cache freshness and consistency across distributed CDN nodes.
